name: EasyCSV API
description: EasyCSV provides a webhook-based API for importing CSV files and processing data. Import CSVs via HTTP POST requests to an EasyCSV endpoint, then receive parsed row data via webhooks to your application. Also supports email-based imports and scheduled imports from Google Sheets, Airtable, and file servers.

apis.name: EasyCSV API
apis.description: EasyCSV provides a webhook-based API for importing CSV files and processing data. Also supports email-based imports and scheduled imports from Google Sheets, Airtable, and file servers.
